functions.name: cc_py_commons.transactions.map_transaction.from_load
documentation: Takes a freight-hub load and maps it to a pricing load (Transaction)

classes.name: cc_py_commons.transactions.transaction.Transaction
documentation:
Represents the pricing database loads table. 
Called Transaction here to clarify the difference between a load that may be active
and a booked or completed transaction used for pricing.

class_variables.name: cc_py_commons.loads.equipment_schema.EquipmentSchema.active
documentation: Match the dataclass default

classes.name: cc_py_commons.loads.load.Load
documentation:
Representation of a freight-hub load.
In freight-hub customer_id = C4 Account ID
source_id comes from the freight-hub sources

classes.name: cc_py_commons.schemas.camel_case_schema.CamelCaseSchema
documentation:
Schema that uses camel-case for its external representation
and snake-case for its internal representation.

modules.name: cc_py_commons.config.pc_miler_config
documentation: refer to the following for more info
"https"://maps.alk.com/PCMDoc/Reports
"https"://maps.alk.com/PCMDoc/CalcMilesReport

classes.name: cc_py_commons.config.env.Config
documentation:
Parent configuration class.

Add all config attributes in the parent class with a default.
Then override as needed in the environment specific configs

classes.name: cc_py_commons.config.env.LocalConfig
documentation: Configurations for running and debugging locally, with a separate local database.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.config.env.DevelopmentConfig
documentation: Configurations for running in dev mode, with a remote database.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.config.env.StagingConfig
documentation: Configurations for running in dev mode, with a remote database.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.config.env.ProductionConfig
documentation: Configurations for running in dev mode, with a remote database.

functions.name: cc_py_commons.services.slack.send_slack_message.execute

variables.name: cc_py_commons.services.mercury.get_lane_price.MERCURY_TOKEN
documentation:
Either returns lane price data or None. 
This does not provide error details to the consumer in case the lookup fails.

functions.name: cc_py_commons.services.carrier_hub.list_carriers.execute
documentation:
Fetch a list of matching carriers from carrier-hub.
Always returns a list.

functions.name: cc_py_commons.services.carrier_hub.list_contacts.execute
documentation:
Fetch a list of matching contacts from carrier-hub.
Always returns a list.

methods.name: cc_py_commons.sqs.sqs_service.SqsService.send
documentation:
Sends a message to the specified queue and returns the messageId. 
The messageId can be used to lookup and delete the message in the queue.

methods.name: cc_py_commons.sqs.booking_assistant_flow_event.BookingAssistantFlowEvent.send
documentation:
Sends and event to the Booking Assistant Flow SQS queue specified in the config.
Returns the messageId of the enqueued message for later retrieval.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.utils.datadog_logger.DataDogLogHandler
documentation:
Logs to DataDog
Requires DD_SITE and DD_API_KEY ENV variables

modules.name: cc_py_commons.utils.logger_v2
documentation: Singleton logger that removes issues with the logger being loaded multiple times and duplicating log entries
Logs to stdout unless the ENV variable LOG_DESTINATION is present.
Currently LOG_DESTINATION only support PAPERTRAIL
Using the json_logger wrapper is preferred.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.utils.logger_v2.SingletonLogger
documentation:
Creates a single instance of the logger with the given name.
Looks for a LOG_DESTINATION ENV variable to determine where to send logs. 
Logs to Standard Out by default. 
Standard Out is automatically captured by DataDog and works for Lambdas.

classes.name: cc_py_commons.utils.logger.ContextFilter
documentation: # DEPRECATED. Use logger_v2 instead

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.datetimes.parse_date_str_to_datetime
documentation: Date, Time, and DateTime handling functions.
The dateutil library is used to have robust string parsing.

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.datetimes.to_utc
documentation: Take a datetime of any timezone and returns a datetime in UTC

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.datetimes.format_datetime
documentation: Takes a datetime object and returns string of the specified format

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.s3_file.get_s3_url
documentation: Returns URL for file

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.bulk_lane_price_result_utils.get_table_name
documentation: SHOULD NOT BE USED GOING FORWARD. Restoring for mercury dependency until all code is released.

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.case_conversion.to_camel_case
documentation:
Converts a dict with keys in snake case to dict with keys
in camel case

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.case_conversion.to_snake_case
documentation:
Converts a dict with keys in camel case to dict with keys
in snake case

functions.name: cc_py_commons.utils.case_conversion.add_undescore_before_numbers
documentation:
Handle an issue with the inflection library while converting camel case 
to underscore
